video.title: Amapiano log drum tutorial - groove and bounce

segments.text: Let's start with the log drum. I'm going to high-pass it around 40 hz to clean up the low end.
Now sidechain the bass to the kick so the sub breathes underneath the groove.
Set the compressor attack fast and the release to about 120 ms so it pumps in time.
Layer a shaker on the off-beats and pan it slightly to the left for width.
Add a clap on the third beat, then compress the drum bus with a 4 to 1 ratio.
Boost around 3 khz on the snare for presence and roll off everything below 200 hz.
Quantize the hi-hats to a 16th swing of about 58 percent to get that amapiano bounce.
Finally, automate the log drum volume so it ducks two db under each vocal phrase.
